race.comment: OURGIRLCANRUN (6) bounced back to winning ways last time out when a strong front-running performance at Ascot. Kept fresh for this and when third-up last campaign, she was only 1.5L off the winner in the Listed Burgess Queen. Should take up the running again and be hard to catch. VATICAN STORM (4) is on resumption today after going back-to-back in his two runs last campaign. His latest trial coming into this was very strong and he looks ready to take the next step this campaign. Can pick up from where he left off. LIKE CLOCKWORK (7) finished off strongly over 1400m at this track last week when beaten 1.6L behind a smart winner. Pike now hops back on board after guiding her to victory first-up at Ascot. Tricky draw here but she'll be doing her best work late. WESTERN ACE (1) is some niggle on his latest trial, but he showed plenty of talent in his debut campaign. Not discounting. SPLIT THE GEE (2) can repeat the dose after a good win last start.
